

The remaining six layers from bottom to top are:

1) Transport (TCP or UDP)
2) Session
3) Presentation (SSL/TLS, JPEG compression/decompression)
4) Application (HTTP over TLS/HTTPS, FTP)
5) Datalink 
6) Network Interface Layer
7) Physical Layer

1. Layer Number - 7: Physical; Standard Name - Data Link Control Protocol (DLC); Example Technology - Ethernet
2. Layer Number - 6: Network; Standard Names - Internet Protocol Suite (IP), Transmission Control Protocol and Internet Protocol Security (TCP/IP)
3. Layer Number - 5: Transport; Standard Names - User Datagram Protocol (UDP), Transmission Control Protocol (TCP); Examples Technologies - IPsec, HTTP/HTTPS
4. Layer Number - 4: Session; Standard Name - Remote Procedure Call (RPC); Example Technology - SCTP/TCP
5. Layer Number - 3: Presentation; Standard Naming conventions do not use defined names but could include formats like ASCII and JPEG for data transfer.
6. Layer Number - 2: Application & Network Interface/Transport User Support, examples often used to be known as Common Management Information Protocol (CMIP), Simple Mail Transfer Protocol (SMTP).
7. Layer Number - 1: Process/Application; Standard Names - File Transfer Access Method (FTP); Example Technology - Remote Desktop Connection, Web Browser Session Interaction.

1. Layer Number - Application (Layer 7): Standard Protocol/Technology - HTTP
2. Layer Number - Presentation (Layer 6): Standard Protocol/Technology - SSL/TLS
3. Layer Number - Session (Layer 5): Standard Protocol/Technology - NetBIOS Sessions
4. Layer Number - Transport (Layer 4): Standard Protocol/Technology - TCP & UDP
5. Layer Number - Network (Layer 3): Standard Protocol/Technology - IP, ARP
6. Layer Number - Data Link (Layer 2): Standard Protocol/Technology - Ethernet
7. Layer Number - Physical (Layer 1): Standard Protocol/Technology - RS-232, Twisted Pair Cable

1) Layer - Internet Protocol (IP)
   Standard Name of Layer - Network Interface/Physical Layer
   Example Technology: Ethernet

2) Layer - Data Link Control
   Standard Name of Layer - Logical Connection-less Transfer Mode
   Example Technology: PPP encapsulation 

3) Layer - Media Access Controls (MAC)
   Standard Name of Layer - Switching and Bridging Layers   
   Example Protocols or Technologies: Gigabit-Ethernet, Fast Ethernet

4) Layer - Network 
   Standard Name of Layer – Internet layer
   Example protocols/technologies: IPX/SPX 

5) Layer - Transport  
   Standard name of the layer : Host to network Interface  (Transport Control)
   Exampel protocol or technology: TCP/IP 


6) Layer - Session and Presentation Controls   
  Standard Names for this layer includes application, session. 
      Example technologies/network protocols are HTTP, SSL/TLS etc.

7) Layers Name in OSI Architecture – Application Layer
    Standard names of the layer include applications.
   Examples Protocols or Technologies: SMTP (email), DNS (Domain Lookup).
